events.title: Monthly rent due
events.computation: Lease begins 2026-09-01; rent due on the first day of each month starting with the first month of the term.
events.source_excerpt: Tenant agrees to pay rent of $1,595.00 per month, due on the first day of each month.
events.details: Rent of $1,595.00 is due on the first day of each month for the lease term.

events.title: Late fee applies if rent unpaid 5 days after due date
events.computation: needs: specific month's rent due date; then add 5 days to determine late fee trigger for that month's payment

recurrence.description: Monthly, 5 days after the 1st (i.e., the 6th), if rent remains unpaid

events.source_excerpt: If rent is not received within five (5) days after the due date, Tenant shall pay a late fee of $50.00.
events.details: A $50.00 late fee applies if rent is not received within 5 days after the monthly due date; a $35.00 fee applies for returned payments.

events.title: Lease non-renewal notice deadline
events.source_excerpt: Tenant must deliver written notice of non-renewal to Landlord at least sixty (60) days before the end of the lease term.
events.details: Tenant must deliver written notice of non-renewal to Landlord by this date, or a $200.00 holdover administration fee applies.

events.title: Lease term ends
events.source_excerpt: beginning on September 1, 2026 and ending on August 31, 2027
events.details: The 12-month lease term ends on this date; the lease terminates unless both parties sign a new agreement.

events.title: Landlord renewal offer due window
events.computation: needs: Anniversary Date (as defined in Landlord's Master Property Schedule, not provided in this document); then add 30 days

resolution.anchor_label: Anniversary Date (defined in Master Property Schedule)

events.source_excerpt: Landlord will deliver a written renewal offer to Tenant within thirty (30) days after the Anniversary Date, as that term is defined in the Master Property Schedule maintained by Landlord.
events.details: Landlord must deliver a written renewal offer within 30 days after the Anniversary Date, a term defined in a document not included here.

events.title: Move-out inspection scheduled
events.source_excerpt: A move-out inspection is scheduled for September 1, 2027 at the Premises.
events.details: A move-out inspection will occur at the Premises on this date; Tenant may be present.

events.title: Security deposit return deadline
events.source_excerpt: The deposit will be returned within thirty (30) days after the move-out inspection, less any lawful deductions for damage beyond normal wear and tear, unpaid rent, or required cleaning.
events.details: Landlord must return the security deposit of $1,595.00, less lawful deductions, within 30 days after the move-out inspection.

ambiguities: The exact date of the Anniversary Date is not stated in this document; it is defined in a separate Master Property Schedule not provided, so the renewal-offer window cannot be resolved to a specific date.
The late-fee trigger date recurs monthly but the exact calendar date depends on each month's rent due date; a generic monthly pattern is given rather than a single resolved date.

events.title: Scholarship acceptance form due
events.source_excerpt: You must sign and return the enclosed acceptance form no later than August 15, 2026.
events.details: Signed acceptance form must be returned by this date or the award is released to the alternate list.

events.title: Proof of full-time enrollment due
events.source_excerpt: You must submit proof of full-time enrollment to the Foundation within fourteen (14) days after the start of the fall semester.
events.details: Registrar's letter or official enrollment certificate must be submitted to the Foundation within 14 days of the fall semester start.

events.title: Annual GPA transcript due
events.computation: Recurring annual deadline of June 30; first upcoming occurrence on or after 2026-07-01 is 2027-06-30

recurrence.description: Annually by June 30, each year the scholarship is held

events.source_excerpt: you must submit an official transcript demonstrating a cumulative GPA of 3.25 or higher by June 30 of each year that you hold the scholarship
events.details: An official transcript showing a cumulative GPA of 3.25 or higher must be submitted by June 30 each year to remain eligible for renewal.

events.title: Fall semester disbursement installment

recurrence.description: Twice yearly, at the start of each semester (fall and spring)

events.source_excerpt: The award is disbursed directly to your institution in two equal installments at the start of each semester.
events.details: The Foundation disburses one installment of the award directly to the institution at the start of the fall semester; no action required from recipient.

events.title: Priority housing grant application deadline (closed)
events.source_excerpt: the priority housing grant application associated with this program closed on June 1, 2026, and late applications are not accepted
events.details: The priority housing grant application window has already closed; late applications are not accepted.

events.title: Notice required for change in enrollment status
events.computation: needs: date of change in enrollment status; then add 30 days

resolution.anchor_label: date of change in enrollment status

events.source_excerpt: You must notify the Foundation in writing within thirty (30) days of any change in your enrollment status, including a reduction below full-time status, a leave of absence, or a transfer to another institution.
events.details: Written notice must be given to the Foundation within 30 days of any change in enrollment status (reduction below full-time, leave of absence, or transfer).

ambiguities: The spring semester start date is not stated, so the second disbursement installment date and its enrollment-related timing cannot be computed.
The enrollment status change notice deadline cannot be computed because the document does not specify when such a change would occur; it is contingent on a future, undated event.

events.title: Monthly premium installment due
events.computation: Recurring on the 15th of each month; first upcoming occurrence on or after 2026-07-01 is 2026-07-15.
events.source_excerpt: payable in monthly installments of $124.00 due on the fifteenth (15th) day of each month
events.details: A premium installment of $124.00 is due on the 15th of each month during the policy period.

events.title: Grace period ends for July installment

recurrence.description: Monthly, 10 days after each installment due date (i.e., on the 25th)

events.source_excerpt: coverage continues during a ten (10) day grace period
events.details: If the monthly installment is not paid by its due date, coverage continues for a 10-day grace period before risking cancellation for non-payment.

events.title: Deadline for cancellation notice to avoid short-rate penalty
events.source_excerpt: written notice of cancellation must be received at least thirty (30) days before the policy expiration date
events.details: To cancel the policy without incurring a short-rate cancellation penalty, written notice must be received by this date, at least 30 days before the policy's expiration on 2027-01-14.

events.title: Renewal offer must be mailed by insurer
events.source_excerpt: A renewal offer, including any premium changes, will be mailed to your address on file on or before December 1, 2026.
events.details: The insurer is required to mail a renewal offer, including any premium changes, on or before this date.

events.title: Policy period expiration / automatic renewal
events.source_excerpt: Your policy is effective from July 15, 2026 through January 14, 2027. Coverage ends at 12:01 a.m. on the expiration date unless the policy is renewed.
events.details: The current policy period ends on this date; if no action is taken, the policy renews automatically on the terms of the mailed renewal offer.

ambiguities: The document does not specify exactly when in each month the grace period recurs relative to non-July installments beyond the stated 10-day rule, though it is assumed to apply uniformly to each monthly due date.
The document does not state a specific deadline for reporting claims, only that they must be reported 'promptly,' so no dated event was created for this.
